introSection: Kiddy-Racer is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Potts Park in Minden, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Kiddy-Racer is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Potts Park in Minden, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.
